hook.text: MCTOMINAY FACES NEYMAR IN MUST-WIN CLASH

beats.text: ANCELOTTI CONFIRMS NEYMAR AVAILABLE FOR SCOTLAND SHOWDOWN
SCOTLAND MUST WIN TO KEEP THEIR WORLD CUP ALIVE
MCTOMINAY LEADS SCOTLAND AFTER CONTROVERSIAL MOROCCO DEFEAT
BRAZIL VS SCOTLAND — JUNE 24 IN MIAMI

caption: Scott McTominay's World Cup moment of destiny is coming 🔴 Carlo Ancelotti has confirmed Neymar is fit and available for Brazil's final Group C game against Scotland on June 24. After losing 1-0 to Morocco in controversial fashion — McTominay denied what looked a clear penalty — Scotland desperately need a win to stay in the World Cup. Brazil have already beaten Haiti 3-0. Now McTominay must somehow inspire Scotland to the biggest upset of the tournament. Can he do it? 👇 #mufc #manutd #football #matchday #worldcup #scotland #mctominay #brazil #neymar
